_meta.description: Pre-built plug-and-play agent templates — outcome-driven, goal-based

templates.name: Get 10 Qualified Leads in 24h
templates.description: Generate 10 qualified B2B leads for your business within 24 hours — complete with contact info, company context, and ICP scoring. No setup required.
templates.task_description: Find 10 qualified B2B leads matching my ideal customer profile. For each lead: company name, decision-maker name and role, email (if findable), company size, and a 1-line reason why they are a good fit. Score each lead 1-10 for ICP match. Export as a ready-to-use list.
setup_steps: Define your Ideal Customer Profile (ICP): industry, company size, location
Set daily lead volume target (default: 10)

templates.name: Close Your First €1k Deal
templates.description: Full end-to-end sales cycle: find prospects, send personalised outreach, follow up, and book a discovery call — all automated. Designed to close your first €1,000 deal.
templates.task_description: Run the full sales pipeline to close a €1,000 deal: find 20 qualified prospects in my niche, write and send personalised cold emails, follow up automatically 3 days later, qualify interested replies, and book discovery calls. Track pipeline value and report daily.
setup_steps: Configure your target niche and ideal customer profile
Add your email sending credentials
Review and approve the first batch of outreach messages

templates.name: Automate Customer Support in 1 Hour
templates.description: Set up 24/7 AI customer support in under 1 hour: auto-resolves 70% of tickets, escalates edge cases, tracks satisfaction. Saves 30–40 hours/month of manual support.
templates.task_description: Set up automated customer support: import FAQs, classify all incoming tickets by urgency, auto-resolve common questions, escalate complex issues with full context, and generate daily support analytics. Time-to-first-response under 2 minutes.
setup_steps: Import your FAQ document into the support-bot knowledge base
Configure escalation rules (which issues need a human)
Set up your email or chat integration to receive tickets

templates.name: Hire Your Best Candidate Faster
templates.description: Cut time-to-hire from 6 weeks to 2 weeks: sources candidates, screens CVs, schedules interviews, manages pipeline — fully automated.
templates.task_description: Automate the full recruitment pipeline: source candidates from job boards, screen CVs against job requirements, send personalised outreach to top candidates, schedule screening calls, and maintain the hiring pipeline. Report weekly on candidate funnel metrics.
setup_steps: Upload your job descriptions and requirements
Configure candidate scoring criteria
Connect your calendar for interview scheduling

templates.name: 10x Your Content Output This Week
templates.description: Full content marketing on autopilot: SEO blog posts, social media, email newsletters, and video scripts — 10x output with zero extra headcount.
templates.task_description: Run the full content automation pipeline: write 2 SEO-optimised blog posts, create daily social media content for LinkedIn/Instagram, generate a weekly email newsletter, produce video scripts, and repurpose long-form content into multiple formats. Track all content performance.
setup_steps: Set your brand voice and tone guidelines
Configure target keywords for SEO content
Connect social media accounts via integrations

templates.name: Run Your E-commerce Store on Autopilot
templates.description: 100% automated e-commerce: order processing, inventory sync, customer emails, social posting, and daily P&L. Run a full Shopify store without lifting a finger.
templates.task_description: Automate the full e-commerce operation: process Shopify orders, validate payments, place supplier orders, sync inventory, handle support tickets, send transactional and marketing emails, post daily social content, research trending products, and generate daily P&L reports.
setup_steps: Connect your Shopify store via API
Connect print-on-demand supplier (Printful, Printify)
Set up Stripe/payment processor integration
Configure email marketing integration

templates.name: Hunt 20 Qualified Leads in 24h
templates.description: Full B2B lead hunt: LeadHunterElite scrapes, qualifies, and enriches 20 leads matching your ICP — complete with outreach scripts ready to deploy.
templates.task_description: Hunt 20 qualified B2B leads in [niche]: scrape public sources, score each against ICP (min score 7/10), enrich with decision-maker contact details, and generate personalised outreach scripts for each. Export as ready-to-use list with outreach copy.
setup_steps: Define your Ideal Customer Profile (ICP): industry, company size, location, role
Set target lead volume (default: 20)
Choose outreach channel: email, LinkedIn, or WhatsApp

templates.name: Launch Cold Outreach Campaign
templates.description: Full multi-channel cold sequence with A/B testing: build sequences, launch across email/LinkedIn/WhatsApp, track replies, and auto follow-up on silence.
templates.task_description: Build and launch a 5-step multi-channel cold outreach sequence for [target_audience]: write A/B tested subject lines, personalized openers, value propositions, and follow-ups. Launch across email and LinkedIn. Track replies and auto-follow up after 3 days of silence.
setup_steps: Define your target audience and offer
Configure email sending credentials
Set follow-up delay (default: 3 days)

templates.name: LinkedIn Growth Blitz (30 Days)
templates.description: 30-day LinkedIn growth plan: optimize your profile, launch connection campaigns, and publish 3 viral posts per week to build audience and generate inbound leads.
templates.task_description: Run a 30-day LinkedIn growth blitz: optimize profile for [role/audience], create weekly viral content plan (3 posts/week), launch targeted connection campaigns to [target_audience], and generate DM templates for warm leads. Track follower growth and lead inbound rate.
setup_steps: Provide LinkedIn profile URL or key profile details
Define your target audience and content topics
Set connection request limit (default: 25/day)

templates.name: Close 5 Deals This Week
templates.description: Sales closing toolkit: handle objections, prepare negotiation tactics, and generate closing scripts for your 5 hottest prospects — ready to deploy in calls and emails.
templates.task_description: Prepare deal-closing assets for 5 prospects: generate objection-handling scripts for [top 3 objections], negotiation tactics brief, closing email templates, and next-step CTA scripts. Prioritise deals by close probability and recommend closing approach per deal.
setup_steps: List your top 5 hot prospects with deal context
Describe your product/service and pricing
Identify the 3 most common objections you face

templates.name: Launch Paid Ads with 3x ROAS Target
templates.description: Full paid ads launch: creative brief, ad copy variants, audience targeting, budget allocation, and ROAS prediction for Meta and/or Google ads.
templates.task_description: Launch a paid ad campaign for [product] on [Meta/Google/LinkedIn]: write 5 ad copy variants (A/B testable), design creative brief, set audience targeting strategy, allocate [budget] across campaigns, predict ROAS, and set up weekly performance review framework.
setup_steps: Define your product, offer, and target audience
Set total ad budget and ROAS target
Choose platforms: Meta, Google, LinkedIn, or all

templates.name: Launch a Referral Program
templates.description: End-to-end referral program: design structure, calculate optimal incentives, write referral copy, and create launch plan to turn customers into ambassadors.
templates.task_description: Design and launch a referral program for [product]: model incentive economics (LTV = [value], CAC = [value]), design two-sided reward structure, write referral email sequence (5 emails), create social sharing copy, set up tracking metrics, and plan fraud prevention.
setup_steps: Provide product LTV and current CAC
Set referral reward budget (% of LTV)
Define customer base size for seeding

templates.name: Build JV Partnership Pipeline
templates.description: Find, score, and pitch 5 joint venture partners in your niche — complete with partner brief, pitch deck outline, and outreach email per partner.
templates.task_description: Build a JV partnership pipeline in [niche]: identify 10 potential partners, score by fit (audience overlap, offer complement, reach), shortlist top 5, generate pitch deck outline and outreach email for each, and recommend deal structure (rev-share/affiliate/co-marketing).
setup_steps: Describe your product/service and target audience
Define your ideal partner profile
Set partnership goal: distribution, revenue-share, or co-marketing

templates.name: Boost Conversion Rate by 50%
templates.description: Full CRO audit and A/B test roadmap: analyze your funnel, identify drop-off points, design 5 A/B tests, and get quick-win improvements to implement today.
templates.task_description: Run a full CRO audit on [funnel/product]: analyze each funnel stage for drop-off, benchmark vs industry, identify top 3 conversion leaks, design 5 A/B tests (ICE scored), provide quick-win copy/UX improvements, and calculate revenue impact of fixing each issue.
setup_steps: Provide funnel stages with current conversion rates
Share monthly visitor/traffic volume
Define primary conversion goal (signup/purchase/call)

templates.name: Improve the AI Employee
templates.description: Systematically analyze the current AI Employee setup and propose concrete improvements to speed, accuracy, agent coordination, and output quality.
templates.task_description: Analyze the current AI Employee agent setup. Identify bottlenecks, inefficiencies, and missed opportunities. Propose 5 concrete improvements with implementation steps.
setup_steps: Review current agent configuration and active skills
Analyze task completion rates and identify failures
Run discovery agent to find optimization opportunities
Generate improvement proposals ranked by impact
Apply approved improvements automatically

templates.name: Optimize Lead Generation
templates.description: Audit your current lead generation process, identify the highest-converting channels, and deploy a multi-channel outreach campaign targeting your ideal customer profile.
templates.task_description: Optimize our lead generation pipeline. Analyze current lead sources, identify the top 3 channels by conversion rate, and launch targeted outreach on each channel.
setup_steps: Define your ideal customer profile (ICP)
Configure lead-generator with target industry and location
Set up cold-outreach-assassin with email sequences
Connect LinkedIn for social selling via LinkedIn growth hacker
Monitor and optimize based on reply rates

templates.name: LinkedIn 30-Day Content Calendar
templates.description: Create a full 30-day LinkedIn content calendar with posts, carousels, and engagement hooks tailored to your niche. Includes scheduling and posting automation.
templates.task_description: Create a 30-day LinkedIn content calendar for my business. Include 3 posts per week: 1 educational post, 1 story/personal post, 1 promotional post. Add hooks, CTAs, and hashtags.
setup_steps: Define your content pillars (3 topics you want to own)
Connect LinkedIn integration
Set your posting schedule (Mon/Wed/Fri recommended)
Review and approve content batch before publishing
Monitor engagement and adjust topics monthly

templates.name: Competitor Analysis & Gap Finding
templates.description: Deep-dive into your top 5 competitors — pricing, messaging, offers, traffic sources, and reviews. Find the gaps you can exploit to win market share.
templates.task_description: Analyze my top 5 competitors. Find: their pricing, unique selling points, messaging, customer complaints (from reviews), traffic sources, and content strategy. Identify 3 gaps I can exploit.
setup_steps: List your top 5 competitors (domain names)
Run deep research on each competitor
Analyze review sites for customer complaints
Map competitor content and SEO strategy
Receive gap analysis report with recommended actions

templates.name: Automate Customer Support
templates.description: Build a fully automated first-line customer support system. Handles FAQs, ticket triage, escalation to humans, and proactive follow-up — 24/7.
templates.task_description: Set up automated customer support. Create FAQ responses for the top 20 questions, build an escalation workflow, and configure proactive follow-up messages for unresolved tickets.
setup_steps: Upload your FAQ document or top support tickets
Configure escalation rules (what gets passed to human)
Connect your support email or helpdesk
Test with 10 sample queries
Go live and monitor resolution rate

templates.name: Email Newsletter Automation
templates.description: Set up a fully automated weekly email newsletter with curated industry news, original insights, and promotional segments — researched and written by AI.
templates.task_description: Create and automate a weekly email newsletter. Research top industry news, write an original insight piece, include a promotional section, and schedule delivery every Tuesday at 9am.
setup_steps: Connect your email platform (Gmail or Mailchimp)
Define your newsletter niche and audience
Set the 3-section structure (news, insight, promo)
Schedule first issue for next Tuesday
Review and approve first issue before sending

templates.name: E-commerce Revenue Boost
templates.description: Optimize your e-commerce store for maximum revenue: product descriptions, pricing strategy, abandoned cart sequences, and upsell/cross-sell funnels.
templates.task_description: Boost e-commerce revenue by: rewriting product descriptions for SEO and conversion, setting up abandoned cart email sequence (3 emails), creating upsell recommendations, and optimizing pricing.
setup_steps: Connect your store (Shopify/WooCommerce URL)
Export product list (CSV with titles and descriptions)
AI rewrites descriptions with SEO + conversion copy
Set up 3-email abandoned cart sequence
Deploy upsell widget on checkout page

templates.name: Paid Ads Setup (Google + Meta)
templates.description: Launch high-converting paid ad campaigns on Google and Meta. Includes keyword research, ad copy, audience targeting, and budget optimization strategy.
templates.task_description: Set up paid advertising campaigns on Google Ads and Meta. Research keywords, write ad copy variants (3 per platform), define audience targeting, and set up conversion tracking.
setup_steps: Define campaign goal (leads, sales, awareness)
Set monthly budget and target CPA
AI generates keyword list and ad copy variants
Review and approve creative before launch
Connect conversion tracking to your website
